title: poa nemoralis var. balbisii
intro: Poa nemoralis var. balbisii, also known as Wood Meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Poa and is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Wood Meadow-grass have been studied for their potential to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Wood Meadow-grass is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
